answer:
Based on the provided text passages, the key people mentioned are:

1. **Dr. Fei-Fei Li** (Stanford University) - Keynote speaker at the Global Tech Summit 2024
2. **Sam Altman** (OpenAI) - Keynote speaker at the Global Tech Summit 2024
3. **Dr. John Preskill** (Caltech) - Keynote speaker at the Global Tech Summit 2024
4. **Dr. Jay Gambetta** (IBM) - Keynote speaker at the Global Tech Summit 2024
5. **Al Gore** (Climate Reality Project) - Keynote speaker at the Global Tech Summit 2024
6. **Greta Thunberg** - Keynote speaker at the Global Tech Summit 2024
7. **Satya Nadella** (Microsoft CEO) - Panelist at the Global Tech Summit 2024
8. **Andy Jassy** (Amazon CEO) - Panelist at the Global Tech Summit 2024
9. **Jensen Huang** (NVIDIA CEO) - Panelist at the Global Tech Summit 2024
10. **Lisa Su** (AMD CEO) - Panelist at the Global Tech Summit 2024
11. **Dr. Robert Zhang** (TechEvents International) - Chairman of the Organizing Committee for the Global Tech Summit 2024
12. **Lisa Park** - Program Director for the Global Tech Summit 2024
13. **Michael Chang** - Sponsorship Director for the Global Tech Summit 2024
14. **Jennifer Wu** - Marketing Director for the Global Tech Summit 2024
15. **David Kim** - Operations Director for the Global Tech Summit 2024
16. **Walt Mossberg** (Journalist) - Moderator for Panel 2: "Quantum Computing: Hype vs Reality"
17. **Andrew Ross Sorkin** (New York Times) - Moderator for Panel 3: "Sustainable Technology"
18. **Tim Cook** (Apple CEO) - Panelist at the Global Tech Summit 2024
19. **Sundar Pichai** (Google CEO) - Panelist at the Global Tech Summit 2024
20. **Peter Chapman** (IonQ CEO) - Panelist at the Global Tech Summit 2024
21. **Dr. Sarah Zhang** (Google Brain) - Author of the paper "Scaling Language Models to 100 Trillion Parameters"
22. **Dr. James Liu** (Stanford) - Author of the paper "Scaling Language Models to 100 Trillion Parameters"
23. **Dr. Maria Rodriguez** (IBM Research) - Author of the paper "Topological Quantum Error Correction at Scale"
24. **Dr. Chen Wei** (MIT) - Author of the paper "Topological Quantum Error Correction at Scale"
25. **Dr. Emily Chen** (Microsoft Research) - Author of the paper "Carbon-Neutral Cloud Computing"
26. **Dr. Thomas Mueller** (TU Munich) - Author of the paper "Carbon-Neutral Cloud Computing"
context:
### TEXT PASSAGES:
Document: sample_tech_conference.md (Page: 1): "# Global Tech Summit 2024 — Conference Report ## Event Overview The **Global Tech Summit 2024** was held on March 15-17, 2024 at the Moscone Center in San Francisco, California. The event attracted over 10,000 attendees from 50+ countries and featured 200+ speakers across 40 sessions. Organized by **TechEvents International**, the summit focused on artificial intelligence, quantum computing, and sustainable technology. ## Keynote Speakers ### Day 1: AI Revolution - **Dr. Fei-Fei Li** (Stanford University) — "The Next Decade of Computer Vision" - Discussed the evolution from ImageNet to multimodal AI - Highlighted the importance of ethical AI development - Predicted AI assistants will be ubiquitous by 2030 - **Sam Altman** (OpenAI) — "Building Safe Artificial General Intelligence" - Announced GPT-5 capabilities preview - Discussed alignment research progress - Emphasized the need for international AI governance ### Day 2: Quantum Computing - **Dr. John Preskill** (Caltech) — "Quantum Error Correction: The Path Forward" - Reviewed progress in topological error correction - Discussed the NISQ era limitations - Presented roadmap to fault-tolerant quantum computing - **Dr. Jay Gambetta** (IBM) — "The Quantum Computing Roadmap to 2033" - Unveiled IBM's 100,000-qubit processor plan - Announced new quantum cloud services - Demonstrated quantum-classical hybrid workflows ### Day 3: Sustainability - **Al Gore** (Climate Reality Project) — "Technology for a Sustainable Future" - Called for carbon-neutral data centers by 2030 - Highlighted AI's role in climate modeling - Announced Green Tech Alliance initiative - **Greta Thunberg** — "Youth Perspectives on Tech Ethics" - Challenged tech industry on environmental impact - Called for responsible innovation frameworks - Emphasized climate justice in technology development ## Notable Announcements ### From Major Companies #### Google - **Gemini 2.0 Ultra** — Next-generation multimodal AI model - **Quantum AI Campus** — New $1B quantum computing facility in Los Alamos - **Carbon-Cloud Initiative** — Commitment to 100% renewable energy by 2025 #### Microsoft - **Azure Quantum** — New quantum cloud platform with 10+ quantum hardware providers - **Copilot Studio** — Enterprise AI agent builder - **Sustainability Cloud** — Carbon accounting and reduction platform #### NVIDIA - **Blackwell B200 GPU** — 25x performance improvement for AI training - **CUDA Quantum** — Hybrid quantum-classical computing platform - **Earth-2** — Global climate simulation platform #### IBM - **Condor Processor** — 1,121-qubit quantum processor (shipping Q2 2024) - **Qiskit Runtime** — Optimized quantum execution environment - **Quantum Safe Cryptography** — Post-quantum encryption library ### From Startups #### PsiQuantum - Announced partnership with GlobalFoundries for photonic quantum chip manufacturing - Goal: Build first commercially useful quantum computer by 2027 - Raised $700M in Series D funding #### Xanadu - Released PennyLane 0.35 with improved quantum machine learning capabilities - Announced quantum networking testbed in Toronto - Partnership with Canadian government for quantum research #### IonQ - Demonstrated 32-algorithm quantum volume record - Announced trapped-ion quantum computer for edge deployment - Partnership with Hyundai for automotive optimization ## Panel Discussions ### Panel 1: "The Future of Work in an AI World" **Moderator:** Kara Swisher (Journalist) **Panelists:** - **Satya Nadella** (Microsoft CEO) — Emphasized AI as augmentation, not replacement - **Andy Jassy** (Amazon CEO) — Discussed AWS AI training programs - **Jensen Huang** (NVIDIA CEO) — Predicted AI will create more jobs than it eliminates - **Lisa Su** (AMD CEO) — Highlighted the need for AI hardware education **Key Takeaways:** - AI will transform jobs, not eliminate them - Reskilling programs are critical - Human-AI collaboration is the future"

Document: sample_acme_corp.txt (Page: 2): "**Salesforce** — CRM integration partnership ### Competitors - **Amazon Web Services (AWS)** — Primary cloud computing competitor - **Google Cloud Platform (GCP)** — AI/ML and cloud competitor - **Microsoft Azure** — Enterprise cloud competitor - **CrowdStrike** — Cybersecurity competitor ## Technology Dependencies ```mermaid graph TD A[AcmeCloud Platform] --> B[Kubernetes] A --> C[Docker] A --> D[PostgreSQL] A --> E[Redis] A --> F[Apache Kafka] G[AcmeAI Suite] --> H[PyTorch] G --> I[TensorFlow] G --> J[Hugging Face] G --> K[NVIDIA CUDA] L[AcmeShield] --> M[OAuth 2.0] L --> N[AES-256] L --> O[SIEM] A --> G A --> L ``` ## Recent News - **January 2024**: Acme raised $50M in Series C funding led by Sequoia Capital - **March 2024**: Launched AcmeCloud 2.0 with serverless capabilities - **June 2024**: AcmeShield won "Best Cybersecurity Product" at RSA Conference - **September 2024**: Partnership with NASA for AI-driven satellite data analysis ### Panel 2: "Quantum Computing: Hype vs Reality" **Moderator:** Walt Mossberg (Journalist) **Panelists:** - **Dr. John Preskill** (Caltech) — "We need realistic expectations" - **Dr. Jay Gambetta** (IBM) — "Quantum advantage is coming, but patience is needed" - **Dr. Hartmut Neven** (Google) — "Error correction is the key bottleneck" - **Peter Chapman** (IonQ CEO) — "Trapped ions will scale first" **Key Takeaways:** - Quantum computing is real but limited - Error correction is the critical challenge - Hybrid quantum-classical is the near-term path ### Panel 3: "Sustainable Technology" **Moderator:** Andrew Ross Sorkin (New York Times) **Panelists:** - **Tim Cook** (Apple CEO) — Announced carbon-neutral supply chain by 2030 - **Sundar Pichai** (Google CEO) — Committed to 24/7 carbon-free energy - **Satya Nadella** (Microsoft CEO) — Pledged carbon negative by 2030 - **Andy Jassy** (Amazon CEO) — Discussed Climate Pledge progress **Key Takeaways:** - Big tech is investing heavily in sustainability - Data center efficiency is improving rapidly - Carbon offset alone is not enough ## Research Presentations ### Best Paper Awards 1. **"Scaling Language Models to 100 Trillion Parameters"** - Authors: Dr. Sarah Zhang (Google Brain), Dr. James Liu (Stanford) - Contribution: Novel architecture for trillion-parameter models - Impact: Enables next-generation AI assistants 2. **"Topological Quantum Error Correction at Scale"** - Authors: Dr. Maria Rodriguez (IBM Research), Dr. Chen Wei (MIT) - Contribution: New error correction codes achieving 10^-6 logical error rate - Impact: Major step toward fault-tolerant quantum computing 3. **"Carbon-Neutral Cloud Computing"** - Authors: Dr. Emily Chen (Microsoft Research), Dr. Thomas Mueller (TU Munich) - Contribution: Framework for zero-emission data centers - Impact: Could reduce cloud computing carbon footprint by 80% ### Poster Session Highlights - **"Quantum Machine Learning for Drug Discovery"** — Xanadu team demonstrated VQE for molecular simulation - **"Federated Learning at Scale"** — Google showed privacy-preserving AI training across 1M devices - **"Neuromorphic Computing for Edge AI"** — Intel presented Loihi 2 chip achieving 100x energy efficiency ## Networking Events ### AI Ethics Dinner - Hosted by **Partnership on AI** - Attended by 200+ AI researchers and executives - Discussed responsible AI development frameworks - Announced new AI safety benchmark ### Quantum Computing Reception - Hosted by **IBM Quantum** - Featured live quantum computing demonstrations - Networking between quantum researchers and industry leaders - Announced Qiskit Global Summer School 2024 ### Startup Showcase - 50 startups presented their technologies - $10M in total prizes awarded - Winners: - **Best AI Startup**: Cognition Labs (AI-powered software development) - **Best Quantum Startup**: QuEra Computing (neutral atom quantum computers) - **Best Sustainability Startup**: Climeworks (direct air capture) ## Statistics | Metric | Value | |--------|-------| | Total Attendees | 10,500 | | Countries Represented | 52 | | Speakers | 215 | | Sessions | 42 | | Workshops | 18 | | Sponsor Companies | 85 | | Startups Showcased | 50 | | Media Coverage | 500+ articles | | Social Media Reach | 50M impressions | | Total Investment Announced | $15B | ## Organizing Committee - **Chairman**: Dr. Robert Zhang (TechEvents International) - **Program Director**: Lisa Park - **Sponsorship Director**: Michael Chang - **Marketing Director**: Jennifer Wu - **Operations Director**: David Kim ## Acknowledgments The summit was made possible by the generous support of our sponsors: - **Platinum Sponsors**: Google, Microsoft, NVIDIA, IBM - **Gold Sponsors**: Amazon, Apple, Meta, Tesla - **Silver Sponsors**: 50+ companies including Salesforce, Oracle, Intel, AMD ## Looking Ahead **Global Tech Summit 2025** will be held on March 14-16, 2025 at the same venue. Early registration is now open at techsummit2025.com. Expected themes: - AGI safety and governance - Quantum computing commercialization - Sustainable technology innovation - AI regulation and policy --- *Report prepared by TechEvents International Media Team* *For more information, visit techsummit2024.com*"
